mapper.select: select qp.id, qp.title, qp.quality_standard, qp.acceptance_rule, qp.owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name, qp.status, qp.created_at, qp.updated_at from quality_plan qp left join sys_user u on u.id = qp.owner_id where qp.project_id = #{projectId} and qp.id = #{id} and qp.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, title, quality_standard, acceptance_rule, owner_id, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from quality_plan where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select qa.id, qa.quality_plan_id, qp.title as quality_plan_title, qa.activity_name, qa.activity_type, qa.planned_date, qa.actual_date, qa.result, qa.owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name, qa.created_at, qa.updated_at from quality_activity qa left join quality_plan qp on qp.id = qa.quality_plan_id left join sys_user u on u.id = qa.owner_id where qa.project_id = #{projectId} and qa.id = #{id} and qa.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, quality_plan_id, activity_name, activity_type, planned_date, actual_date, result, owner_id, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from quality_activity where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update quality_activity set quality_plan_id = #{qualityPlanId}, activity_name = #{activityName}, activity_type = #{activityType}, planned_date = #{plannedDate}, actual_date = #{actualDate}, result = #{result}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, metric_name, metric_value, metric_unit, statistic_date, created_at from quality_metric where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id}
select id, project_id, metric_name, metric_value, metric_unit, statistic_date, created_at from quality_metric where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id}
